---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 1"
author: "HTC"
date: "September, 2025"
date-modified: "last-modi"
format: 
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: true
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

# Overview

This is hands-on Exercise 1

## Getting started

```{r}
pacman::p_load{sf, tidyverse}
```

### Importing data
---

elcome to ISSS626 Geospatial Analytics and Application

Coursework website

![](images/image_ex1.webp)
